name: Founder Review Package
description: Turns a slice's PR into a founder-readable review package: a durable markdown artifact (docs/review/REVIEW-<pr>-<slice>.md) and a condensed PR comment. Every section is pulled from a cited source (gh PR view, git log/diff, the PR body, the VERIFY artifact). The 'how to test it yourself' guide is engineer-seeded + URL-interpolated (never diff-invented), screenshots are real-or-explicit-N/A (never fabricated), and posting the PR comment is effectful + fail-closed (default prints, only --post posts).

output.comment: a condensed PR comment (printed by default; posted only with --post)

observability.outcome: the rendered package + the effect log (wrote <artifact>; comment printed-only vs posted); structured --json report
